/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib -o libos2l.dylib -install_name @rpath/libos2l.dylib CMakeFiles/os2l.dir/os2l_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/os2l.dir/__/interfaces/qlcioplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/os2l.dir/os2lconfiguration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/os2l.dir/os2lplugin.cpp.o -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtNetwork.framework/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
